name: a4-office-products-pos
description: A4 Office Products POS Platform - Monorepo Root

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix client && npm install --prefix server
scripts.ci:all: npm ci && npm ci --prefix client && npm ci --prefix server
scripts.format: prettier --write "client/src/**/*.{js,jsx,css,json}" "client/scripts/**/*.mjs" client/vite.config.js "server/src/**/*.js" "server/scripts/**/*.mjs" package.json client/package.json server/package.json ecosystem.config.js
scripts.format:check: prettier --check "client/src/**/*.{js,jsx,css,json}" "client/scripts/**/*.mjs" client/vite.config.js "server/src/**/*.js" "server/scripts/**/*.mjs" package.json client/package.json server/package.json ecosystem.config.js
scripts.lint: npm run lint --prefix server && npm run lint --prefix client
scripts.check: npm run format:check && npm run check --prefix client && npm test --prefix server && npm run deploy:check
scripts.security:audit: npm audit --audit-level=high && npm audit --prefix client --audit-level=high && npm audit --prefix server --audit-level=high
